Apply function on running windows (single-pass)

Source: R/RcppExports.R
runner_run.Rd

Computes window bounds and applies function in a single C++ loop, avoiding intermediate list allocation.

runner_run(
  x,
  f,
  k = integer(0),
  lag = integer(1),
  idx = integer(0),
  at = integer(0),
  na_pad = FALSE
)

Arguments

x

vector input

f

function to apply on each window

k

window size

lag

window lag

idx

optional index vector

at

optional output index vector

na_pad

whether to pad with NA for incomplete windows

Value

list of results from applying f on each window

Contents
